title: Ethereal Studio Portrait
sourceTitle: Create Ultra Realistic Photography Ultra Detail 8K

imagePrompts.prompt:
Create ultra-realistic photography, ultra-detail, 8K UHD, Medium portrait shot of a serene and romantically ethereal 25-year-old woman. Facial features, body proportions are strictly identical to reference. She is wearing a breathtaking off-the-shoulder sheer champagne gown with intricate floral appliqués and real coral roses woven into the bodice, elegant strappy heels. Soft romantic makeup with peachy blush and matte mauve-pink lips. Messy romantic dark brown updo with loose wavy tendrils framing her face. Natural brown contact lenses. Holding a delicate coral rose near her face with a peaceful expression, eyes softly closed. Dark and moody studio setting. Soft directional chiaroscuro studio lighting, perfect catchlights in the eyes, glowing skin. Background is a beautiful bokeh of a dark teal and grey abstract textured canvas backdrop. Cinematic photo and lighting, highly detailed, sharp focus on all objects.
2:3ar
